transcript_preview: 12.11. Klausies un lasi. Sveika! Kā klājas? Vai tu studēji? Sveiks! Nē, es vairs nestudēju. Es tagad meklēju darbu. Kur tu gribi strādāt? Kādā nelielā uzņēmumā. Par ko tu gribi strādāt? Es gribu strādāt par frizieri. Varbūt varu tev palīdzē
translation_preview: Jehovah's Witnesses, 8 / 1 Hey! How are you? Did you study? Hey! No, I didn't study anymore. I'm looking for a job now. Where do you want to work? One small company. What do you want to work for? I want to work as a hairdresser. Maybe I can
